prompt: Monochromatic logo design on pure black background. A rectangle with a thick pure white (#FFFFFF) border outline (3-4px), sharp corners. Inside is solid black. In the center, two lines of text stacked: 'MM' on top and 'AGENCY' below, both in bold pure white (#FFFFFF) uppercase. CRITICAL: Both words use the EXACT SAME typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Everything is pure white on black — no yellow, no gray, no color. Monochromatic. Wide rectangular strokes, sharp 90-degree corners. Clean vector quality, flat design, centered.
